title: Caldera - Credential Search in Config and Environment Files (Windows)
description: Detects broad-scope search for credentials stored in configuration files, scripts, and environment files. Caldera T1552 emulation runs findstr with password-related keywords across common file types and user profile directories, extending beyond the specific filename-based search in credential_file_discovery.yaml.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (( ('Process Name' like '*\\findstr.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*password*' or 'Command Line' like '*passwd*' or 'Command Line' like '*secret*' or 'Command Line' like '*apikey*' or 'Command Line' like '*api_key*' or 'Command Line' like '*token*')) and (('Command Line' like '*/s*' or 'Command Line' like '*/r*')) ) or ( (('Command Line' like '*Select-String*' or 'Command Line' like '*sls *' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-Content*')) and (('Command Line' like '*password*' or 'Command Line' like '*passwd*' or 'Command Line' like '*apikey*' or 'Command Line' like '*api_key*' or 'Command Line' like '*secret*')) ) or (('Command Line' like '*.env*' or 'Command Line' like '*config.json*' or 'Command Line' like '*appsettings.json*' or 'Command Line' like '*web.config*' or 'Command Line' like '*database.config*')))
falsepositives: Security hardening scripts auditing for credential exposure
Static analysis tools scanning for secrets
